BinaryAsh

Hi I'm Ash, also called Ash-The-Coder & BinaryAsh Welcome to my portfolio! Explore my work in web development, data science, machine learning, graphic design, and embedded systems. I am available for job opportunities and collaborative projects.

Portfolio

  • Dashboard App

    Enhance productivity with news, tasks, notes, events, reminders.

  • Simple Projects

    Explore diverse, beginner-friendly coding projects with explanations and documentation.

  • Django Blog

    Blog Website built with Django.

  • Attd Calc WIP

    Attendance calculator built with Django, tracks student attendance and remaining hours.

  • Taskmanager WIP

    Built with Django REST API for data scraping with Celery, Selenium.

  • DataUp WIP

    Django web app analyzes Excel/CSV files, generates summary reports.
